goal: Close all outstanding branches from v3, complete the low-friction wave with a final verdict, then conditionally explore weak-window repair and medium-friction branches under strict gate discipline.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify the base snapshot.
Rejected branches must not be reopened: H1_post_funding_long, H2_expiry_lead_lag, A1_high_iv_long_v1, A1b_high_iv_momentum, A4_wed_afternoon.
Static high-IV regime is a volatility regime descriptor, not a directional signal.
Every branch must reach a terminal decision (promoted / rejected / formally-skipped) before any downstream gate unlocks.
Do not confuse a data task with a research result — feature materialization ≠ hypothesis validation.
Medium-friction wave is locked until every low-friction branch is closed and weak-window repair is completed.

slices.title: Полный closure-audit по прошлым планам
slices.hypothesis: Create a unified open-items register of all unresolved work from prior plan versions before starting new research.
slices.objective: Create a unified open-items register of all unresolved work from prior plan versions before starting new research.
success_criteria: A single open-items register exists and is recorded in project memory.
The immutable reference snapshot is formally recorded.
evidence_requirements: A single open-items register exists and is recorded in project memory.
The immutable reference snapshot is formally recorded.

slices.title: Формально закрыть все незавершенные документы и memory-nodes прошлых планов
slices.hypothesis: Eliminate organizational debt by attaching terminal status to every dangling branch from v3.
slices.objective: Eliminate organizational debt by attaching terminal status to every dangling branch from v3.
success_criteria: No branch in research memory lacks a terminal node (promoted / rejected / skipped).
evidence_requirements: No branch in research memory lacks a terminal node (promoted / rejected / skipped).

slices.title: Полностью закрыть ветку A2_iv_acceleration
slices.hypothesis: Drive the main unfinished branch from v3 (A2 IV acceleration) to a definitive terminal decision through a full acceptance chain.
slices.objective: Drive the main unfinished branch from v3 (A2 IV acceleration) to a definitive terminal decision through a full acceptance chain.
success_criteria: A2_iv_acceleration has a terminal decision (promoted or rejected).
Standalone and integration results are recorded.
evidence_requirements: A2_iv_acceleration has a terminal decision (promoted or rejected).
Standalone and integration results are recorded.
